basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Lab Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Indian Institute of Technology Indore . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree (B.Sc.) in Physics, 03 years of relevant experience.
qualification.details: Essential: Bachelor’s degree (B.Sc.) in Physics from a recognized Institute. Good communication and management skills. Proficiency in computer operations. 03 years of relevant experience in physics teaching labs or a related field in an Educational / Research Institute. Desirable: Post-graduation degree (M.Sc.) in Physics from a recognized Institute, awarded not earlier than two years prior to the date of application.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Indore Junior Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 through Online mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Junior Lab Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Lab Assistant post is 19th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree (B.Sc.) in Physics from a recognized Institute, along with 03 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Lab Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Lab Assistant post is 28 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Lab Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. ₹27,806/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Lab Assistant post at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIT Indore offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable qualifications for the Junior Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: A desirable qualification is a Post-graduation degree (M.Sc.) in Physics from a recognized Institute, awarded not earlier than two years prior to the date of application.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Indore located?
faq.answer: IIT Indore is located on Khandwa Road in Simrol, Indore, Madhya Pradesh.
